text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tracen Academy is going to be featured in a TV
program.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As part of the show, there's going to be an
in-school race with everyone in their signature
racewear.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪ They asked specifically for me! They know what they're doing!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Now everyone will see me sweep the floor with
the competition!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tokai Teio bounces up and down. It's then that I
notice the hem of her racewear is curling up.
choice_data_list: Hey, your hem is all messed up.
Hey, your hem is all messed up.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh, it is! Fix it, pretty please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I adjust her outfit and tell her good luck, she
squints her eyes as if looking at a bright light.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: This kinda takes me back. See, this one time...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Wow! Prez won again!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
The way she runs is so beautiful! Now that's an
Emperor! Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Great job, Prez!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ah, Teio.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You're so amazing! I wanna be just like you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I wanna be the cool Umamusume who steals the
spotlight!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Your ambition is commendable. In that case...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf extends a hand to Tokai Teio's
uniform and fixes her hem.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You must act as a model for other students—not
only in races, but also in your studies and
appearance.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Do that, and your ambitions will be realized.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Yes. "Eclipse first, the rest nowhere." One day,
that will be you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Can you believe it? ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
When she fixed my outfit, it was like all this
power just suddenly welled up inside of me!
choice_data_list: Like some kind of good luck charm?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
When she fixed my outfit, it was like all this
power just suddenly welled up inside of me!
choice_data_list: Like some kind of good luck charm?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I feel amazing! You give me power too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Now that I'm gonna be on TV, I gotta be a model
runner for everyone tuning in at home too!
choice_data_list: I'm sure you can do it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah! You better watch me win, Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I won't lose to anyone! Victory will be mine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Teio takes that power and turns it into an
overwhelming win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She flies like the wind itself out on the turf. Truly
a model runner.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Maybe! But whenever I do it myself, nothing
changes.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I dunno why, but it has to be you or Prez.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
So I'm leaving all the uniform checks to you,
Trainer! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Tokai Teio laughs triumphantly.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Comin' through! Make way for the great Teio!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Teio flies out of the gate and lands an
overwhelming win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Powered up by her good luck charm, she shines
more brilliantly than ever.
